---
title: "Assignment-8"
author: "Tushar Sharma"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

# Regression Diagnostics and Hat Matrix Analysis

## Objective

1.  Understand the mathematical structure of linear regression.

2.  Compute the **Hat Matrix** manually.

3.  Identify **leverage and influential observations**.

4.  Evaluate regression assumptions using diagnostic plots and statistical tests

## Dataset

#### - - - - Boston Housing Data set - - - -

Target variable:

```         
MEDV → Median value of owner-occupied homes
```

Predictor examples:

```         
RM, LSTAT, CRIM, NOX
```

-   Loading libraries

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(car)
library(lmtest)
library(nortest)
library(qpcR)
```

```{r}
setwd("D:/Sem-2/R-/7,8,9,10/7")
data<-read.csv("HousingData.csv")
head(data)
```

```{r}
str(data)
summary(data)
```

### Correlation Matrix

```{r}
cor(data)
```

### Scatter Plot

```{r}
pairs(data[,c("MEDV","RM","LSTAT","CRIM","NOX")])
```

## Multiple linear Regression Model

-   Regression model

    ![](images/Screenshot%202026-03-09%20140754.png)

```{r}
model <- lm(MEDV ~ RM + LSTAT + CRIM + NOX, data=data)

summary(model)
```

### Understanding the Hat Matrix

![](images/Screenshot%202026-03-09%20141012.png){fig-align="center"}

## Construct Design Matrix

```{r}
X <- model.matrix(model)

head(X)
```

### Compute Hat Matrix Manually

```{r}
H <- X %*% solve(t(X) %*% X) %*% t(X)

dim(H)
```

### - Extract Levrage Values

```{r}
leverage <- diag(H)

head(leverage)
```

### Residual Analysis

```{r}
#residual s
res <- residuals(model)

print(res)
```

## Plot Residuals vs Fitted

```{r}
plot(model$fitted.values,
     res,
     xlab="Fitted Values",
     ylab="Residuals",
     main="Residual vs Fitted")

abline(h=0,col="red")
```

### - Histogram of Residuals

```{r}
hist(res,
     breaks = 20,
     col = "lightblue",
     main = "Histogram of Residuals",
     xlab = "Residuals")
```

### Density plot

```{r}
plot(density(res),
     main = "Density Plot of Residuals",
     xlab = "Residuals",
     col = "blue",
     lwd = 2)
```

### Boxplot of residual

```{r}
boxplot(res,
        main = "Boxplot of Residuals",
        col = "orange")
```

### Scale-Location Plot

```{r}
plot(model$fitted.values,
     sqrt(abs(res)),
     xlab = "Fitted Values",
     ylab = "Sqrt(|Residuals|)",
     main = "Scale-Location Plot")

abline(h=0,col="red")
```

### Levrage Pot

```{r}
plot(hatvalues(model),
     type="h",
     main="Leverage Values",
     ylab="Leverage")

```

```{r}

```
